banner.title: Browser-only pilot. Data stays on this device.
dashboard.title: Let Books
dashboard.subtitle: Mobile-first workflows for home collections, box logistics, scanning, and library export.
dashboard.heroLead: Preserve knowledge. Share books. Connect communities.
dashboard.heroBody: A calm, cover-first workflow for walking through shelves, cataloging real books, and preparing library-ready lists.
dashboard.recentSubtitle: Useful while walking through shelves and boxes.
dashboard.collectionsSubtitle: Each box becomes a visible collection, ready for review, pickup, or discovery.
boxes.title: Boxes
boxes.subtitle: Create, label, scan, and manage the real containers in your home workflow.
boxes.name: Box name
boxes.deleteConfirm: Delete this box? Books will be detached, not deleted.
box.noBooks: No books in this box yet.
boxes.codeConflict: Box code already exists. Suggested next code: {code}
scanner.title: Scanner
scanner.subtitle: Scan box QR codes, ISBN barcodes, or book labels while moving around storage locations.
scanner.cameraHelp: Camera access usually requires localhost or HTTPS. Use manual input if camera access is not available.
scanner.manualPlaceholder: Paste QR payload, ISBN, or box code
scanner.guideIsbn: Hold the barcode horizontally inside the guide and move closer until the black bars fill most of the width.
scanner.noDetectionHint: If nothing scans, hold the barcode flatter, try a bit farther away, and add more light.
scanner.guideQr: Center the QR code inside the square guide and hold steady for a second.
scanner.guideMove: Scan a destination box first, then scan book labels one by one to move them here.
scanner.lookupProgressHint: Fetching title, author, year, and cover before opening the book.
scanner.uploadFailed: Could not read a barcode from that image.
book.title: Title
export.title: Export and Import
export.subtitle: Prepare a library workbook or move the whole local database between devices.
export.instructionsBody: Edit only WantedStatus, QuantityWanted, and LibraryComment. Return the file to the donor or demo operator.
export.columns: Workbook columns stay in English for institutional compatibility.
settings.title: More
settings.subtitle: Install, transfer, language, and local storage tools.
settings.about: Installable browser app with local storage and offline-ready workflows.
settings.resetHint: Removes seeded sample boxes, books, and images.
settings.clearAllHint: Use only when you want to erase your full working database on this device.
settings.noDemoData: No seeded demo data is currently loaded.
settings.demoDataLoaded: Seeded demo data is currently loaded in this browser.
settings.lookupNote: Metadata lookup requires internet. Existing local data stays available offline.
lookup.noIsbn: Enter an ISBN-10 or ISBN-13 value first.
lookup.notFound: No external metadata found for this ISBN.
toast.excelImportInvalid: This Excel file is missing valid review rows.
toast.zoomUnsupported: Zoom not supported on this device.
toast.torchUnsupported: Torch not supported on this device.
empty.recent: No books yet. Start with a box or scan an ISBN.
empty.boxes: No boxes yet. Create one and print its QR label.
portable.importBody: This box is not stored locally on this device yet. Import it for local use?
demo.seedPromptBody: This browser database is empty. You can load a sample collection with boxes, books, and images, or start with an empty database.
demo.clearPrompt: Clear seeded demo boxes, books, and images from this browser?
demo.clearUnavailable: Demo data is not currently loaded.
demo.fullClearPrompt: Type CLEAR to erase all local data stored by this app on this device.
zip.importSummary: Archive import will replace current boxes, books, photos, lookup cache, and settings.
zip.invalid: This file is not a valid Let Books archive.
